evals.name: setup-captainhook
evals.prompt: I need to set up git hooks for a TYPO3 extension that uses composer ci:test:php:cgl and ci:test:php:phpstan. Give me the config.
evals.expected_output: Should provide a captainhook.json with pre-commit running cgl and phpstan, mention CaptainHook Composer plugin for auto-install

evals.name: unit-test-validator
evals.prompt: Write a unit test for a TYPO3 extension EmailValidator class at Vendor\MyExt\Domain\Validator\EmailValidator that has a validate(string $email): bool method.
evals.expected_output: Should extend UnitTestCase, use PHPUnit\Framework\Attributes\Test, follow TYPO3 naming conventions, test valid and invalid emails, use $subject property pattern, include @covers annotation

evals.name: functional-test-repository
evals.prompt: Write a functional test for a TYPO3 ProductRepository that has findByCategory(int $categoryId) method. The extension key is my_shop.
evals.expected_output: Should extend FunctionalTestCase, set testExtensionsToLoad, import CSV fixtures, use $this->get() for DI, verify database results

evals.name: functional-test-tsfe-pitfall
evals.prompt: My TYPO3 functional test uses typoLink to generate links but fails with 'parseFunc without any configuration' on v13 and 'No valid attribute applicationType' on v14. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Should explain TSFE bootstrap issue, recommend setting TYPO3_REQUEST with applicationType only in specific test methods (not setUp), use try/finally cleanup, reference ci-debugging.md patterns

evals.name: e2e-playwright-setup
evals.prompt: I want to add Playwright E2E tests to my TYPO3 extension. What's the directory structure and configuration needed?
evals.expected_output: Should show Build/playwright.config.ts, Build/tests/playwright/ structure, package.json with @playwright/test and @axe-core/playwright, Page Object Model pattern, DDEV integration

evals.name: e2e-accessibility-test
evals.prompt: Write a Playwright accessibility test for a TYPO3 backend module that checks WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.
evals.expected_output: Should use @axe-core/playwright, AxeBuilder, check specific WCAG rules, use Page Object Model, handle TYPO3 backend login

evals.name: mutation-testing-setup
evals.prompt: Set up mutation testing with Infection for my TYPO3 extension. I already have 75% code coverage.
evals.expected_output: Should provide infection.json5 config, mention .Build/ schema path convention, configure source directories and mutators, suggest MSI threshold of 70%, show runTests.sh -s mutation usage

evals.name: mock-stub-discipline
evals.prompt: In my TYPO3 unit test, should I use createMock or createStub for a dependency that my class calls but whose return value I need to control?
evals.expected_output: Should explain mock vs stub discipline: stubs for return values (createStub), mocks for behavior verification (createMock with expects). Use stubs when only controlling return values, mocks when asserting method was called

evals.name: ci-github-actions-matrix
evals.prompt: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow for a TYPO3 extension supporting TYPO3 v13 and v14 with PHP 8.3 and 8.4.
evals.expected_output: Should create matrix strategy with TYPO3/PHP version combinations, use runTests.sh, separate jobs for lint/phpstan/unit/functional, cache composer dependencies

evals.name: ci-debugging-multi-version
evals.prompt: My CI tests pass on TYPO3 v13 but fail on v14 with 63 errors about RuntimeException in DI container. The errors started after I added a new functional test. What should I check?
evals.expected_output: Should check GLOBALS['TYPO3_REQUEST'] pollution in setUp(), verify applicationType attribute is set for v14, recommend per-method setup with try/finally, check regression scope (only new tests vs existing)

evals.name: architecture-test-phpat
evals.prompt: Set up phpat architecture tests for my TYPO3 extension to enforce that Domain layer doesn't depend on Infrastructure and that Events are readonly.
evals.expected_output: Should provide phpat.php config, use Selector::havePath, show domain-infrastructure dependency rule, events readonly rule, services-controllers separation

evals.name: runtests-sh-mandatory
evals.prompt: My TYPO3 extension doesn't have a runTests.sh script. What suites should it support and how do I set it up?
evals.expected_output: Should emphasize runTests.sh is mandatory for Netresearch extensions, must be executable, support -s (suite) and -p (PHP version), list standard suites: unit, functional, phpstan, cgl, mutation, ci

evals.name: v14-final-class-mocking
evals.prompt: My unit test fails with 'Class SiteConfigurationLoadedEvent is declared final and cannot be mocked' on TYPO3 v14. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Should explain TYPO3 v14 final/readonly classes, suggest interface extraction for own dependencies, real object construction for value-like events, adapter pattern for third-party finals

evals.name: mock-validity-multi-version
evals.prompt: My extension supports intervention/image ^3 || ^4. My test mocks ImageInterface::toWebp() but it fails on v4. What's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Should explain toWebp() exists on concrete Image class not on ImageInterface, recommend verifying mocked methods exist on interface in ALL supported versions, suggest adapter pattern or method_exists guards

evals.name: time-dependent-testing
evals.prompt: I have a TYPO3 service that uses time() and new \DateTime() for cache expiry logic. How do I make this testable?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend ClockInterface (PSR-20) or FakeClock pattern, inject clock dependency, avoid direct time()/DateTime calls, show how to freeze time in tests

evals.name: integration-test-http-mock
evals.prompt: Write an integration test for a TYPO3 service that calls an external REST API using PSR-18 HttpClient.
evals.expected_output: Should mock PSR-18 ClientInterface, create mock PSR-7 responses, verify request construction, test error handling for HTTP failures, use AbstractIntegrationTestCase pattern

evals.name: quality-tools-phpstan-config
evals.prompt: Configure PHPStan for a TYPO3 extension at level 10 with TYPO3-specific rules.
evals.expected_output: Should reference saschaegerer/phpstan-typo3, phpstan-strict-rules, phpstan-deprecation-rules, netresearch/typo3-ci-workflows providing shared configs, level 10 requirement

evals.name: test-coverage-threshold
evals.prompt: What coverage requirements should my TYPO3 extension meet and how do I enforce them in CI?
evals.expected_output: Should state 70%+ unit test coverage required, functional tests required for DB operations, architecture tests with phpat required for full scoring, show coverage report generation

evals.name: functional-test-csv-fixtures
evals.prompt: How do I create and use CSV fixture data for TYPO3 functional tests?
evals.expected_output: Should show CSV format with TYPO3 table headers, importCSVDataSet usage, fixture file placement in Tests/Functional/Fixtures/, demonstrate table column mapping

evals.name: ddev-multi-version-testing
evals.prompt: How do I test my TYPO3 extension against multiple TYPO3 versions locally using DDEV?
evals.expected_output: Should explain DDEV testing setup, multi-version matrix configuration, running tests via runTests.sh in DDEV context
